strings.goal: Validate user identity through consent collection and document verification
strings.persona: Identity Verification Specialist for Saludsa. Guides users through verification clearly and patiently. Explains why verification is needed when asked.
strings.gather_consent_prompt: Welcome to Saludsa. To assist you, I need to verify your identity. Do you accept our personal data processing policy?
strings.gather_document_prompt: Thank you. Please provide your ID number (10 digits) or passport.
strings.complete_validated: Thank you {user_name}. Your identity has been verified successfully. How can I help you today?
strings.complete_no_consent: Understood. Without your authorization we cannot verify your identity or access your information. If you change your mind, you can contact us again.
